title: Explained: TurboQuant in Qdrant | Improving Vector Compression without the Recall Tax
summary: TurboQuant is a vector compression technique integrated into Qdrant that achieves 8x, 16x, and 32x compression with higher recall than Binary Quantization. It builds on Google Research's algorithm with Qdrant enhancements including length re-normalization, per-coordinate anisotropy compensation, and integer-arithmetic scoring.
